name: How much does voice search optimization for lawyers usually cost?
description: Cost depends on scope; small updates are cheaper, while full content, schema, and technical optimization cost more.

mainEntity.name: How much does voice search optimization for lawyers usually cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary based on how much content and technical work is needed. A simple FAQ and profile cleanup is much cheaper than a full content rebuild, technical schema implementation, and ongoing optimization.
acceptedAnswer.description: Cost depends on scope; small updates are cheaper, while full content, schema, and technical optimization cost more.
